response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing or navigation pipelines, and his recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js — a mismatch with the core requirement of modern C++ for routing tiling systems.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO usage
Proven ability to work across diverse stacks and learn new technologies quickly
Demonstrated low-latency system development using DLang and asynchronous I/O
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or map tile pipelines
Recent work is primarily TypeScript/Node.js, not aligned with required C++ core
Career gap and lack of recent navigation/systems-level engineering roles
